tweets.text: For its commitment to sustainable operations, @SecPompeo honors @PepsiCoIndia. The company saved 17B+ liters of water in 2017 through its community water programs focused on water replenishment & water conservation agricultural practices. https://t.co/Pk1qnv9hfq #SecStateACE https://t.co/mvqjBlsJMu

.@SecPompeo recognizes @AgilisPartners in Uganda for investing in local communities, setting high product standards, using sustainable farming methods, & paying competitive wages. https://t.co/Pk1qnv9hfq #SecStateACE https://t.co/VpGYp9ZO1Q

.@SecPompeo honors @ProcterGamble Asia Pacific, a leading voice in the gender equality movement within 16 countries across the Asia-Pacific region, for supporting and empowering women leaders. https://t.co/Pk1qnv9hfq #SecStateACE https://t.co/hREHiz2CEX

For its focus on creating stability and economic empowerment in the lives of women in areas of conflict, @SecPompeo recognizes @ChambersFed in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. https://t.co/Pk1qnv9hfq #SecStateACE https://t.co/TdOHrSxcQe

Today, during the Award for Corporate Excellence ceremony, @SecPompeo honored four U.S. companies for promoting and upholding high corporate social responsibility standards in the communities where they do business. Since 1999, each Secretary of State has honored U.S. companies overseas that uphold the highest standard of business practices w/ the Award for Corporate Excellence. This year's winners are leaders in women’s economic empowerment & sustainable operations. https://t.co/z4rtbssnXt
.@SecPompeo: We know China weakens America’s manufacturing base by conducting massive intellectual property theft. https://t.co/XIvv9E1MpC

.@SecPompeo: When we see Beijing use coercion as a preferred tool of statecraft, it’s not good for those of us who believe in democracy and sovereignty as the fundamental norms that ought to dominate world commerce and the way nations interact.
https://t.co/XIvv9E1MpC

.@SecPompeo on International #ReligiousFreedom Day : We will stand with and for all those seeking to live out the dictates of their faiths. An attack on religious freedom anywhere is an affront to religious freedom everywhere. https://t.co/eHebojCICW https://t.co/TIoKLfdUHz

As we celebrate International #ReligiousFreedom Day on October 27, @IRF_Ambassador Samuel Brownback provides an update on the state of this unalienable right around the world. Read more: https://t.co/qAsPnSneJJ https://t.co/LxHzISjafx

On October 27, we celebrate International Religious Freedom Day, which marks the passage of the 1998 International #ReligiousFreedom Act, and reaffirm our commitment as a nation to the rights of freedom of thought, conscience, and religion. https://t.co/i4TLJtezVR https://t.co/mT9NEIkq93

More than 80 percent of people live in places where #religiousfreedom is denied or threatened. Dabrina Bet-Tamraz describes the persecution her family endured in #Iran. More stories from survivors of religious persecution: https://t.co/hCjejSNEz3 https://t.co/AuBiFPKhbd

.@SecPompeo: "We must recognize the roots of religious repression. Authoritarian regimes and autocrats will never accept a power higher than their own. And that causes all sorts of assaults on human dignity." More on #ReligiousFreedom: https://t.co/i4TLJtezVR https://t.co/Paj2SgB6y1
